_doc: PERF-INIT-V2.1 PR-G2: route performance baseline. Extended schema with sliding history (FIFO 30 entries per route key, 14-day window). Sliding stats (median/p95/stdDev) recomputed by scripts/perf/sliding-baseline-check.mjs --append-history. Hard-fail activation requires _phase=hard-fail + _hardFailActivationDate + complete _hardFailActivation evidence block; see scripts/perf/README.md.
_acceptance: Codex thread 019e26f9 AGREE — spike PR #489 merged 2026-05-14; G2 impl PR #502 (cross-AI Codex review thread 019e2776 iter-2). Hard-fail flip blocked on (a) 14-day history accumulation, (b) <=1 FP / last 20 + <3 FP / last 100, (c) owner activation.
_methodology: median of 5 runs per CI execution, foreground only, fixed bundled Chrome version, hidden-page invalid. See scripts/ci/route-performance-budget.mjs.
